sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fuzz (value Float64, fallback Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT value, fallback, ifNotFinite(value, fallback) AS result FROM test_fuzz;
UPDATE test_fuzz SET fallback = 5.0 WHERE value = Infinity;
SELECT AVG(ifNotFinite(value, fallback)) AS average_value FROM test_fuzz;
